field.label: Use aliases
field.help: Use firewall aliases instead of manually entered networks for source filters and whitelist groups.

field.label: Use upstream whitelist alias
field.help: Use a firewall alias instead of manual multicast networks.

field.label: Upstream whitelist alias
field.help: Name of a firewall alias containing IPv4 multicast networks.

field.label: Upstream Whitelist Groups
field.help: Allowed IPv4 multicast groups on the upstream interface, for example 232.0.0.0/8.

field.label: Use downstream whitelist alias
field.help: Use a firewall alias instead of manual multicast networks.

field.label: Downstream whitelist alias
field.help: Name of a firewall alias containing IPv4 multicast networks.

field.label: Downstream Whitelist Groups
field.help: Allowed IPv4 multicast groups on downstream interfaces, for example 232.0.0.0/8.

field.label: Enable source filter
field.help: Generate upstream source filter rules. Destination groups are taken from the resolved upstream whitelist.

field.label: Use source alias
field.help: Use a firewall alias instead of manual source networks.

field.label: Source alias
field.help: Name of a firewall alias containing allowed IPv4 source hosts or networks. The alias content must not be multicast.

field.label: Source networks
field.help: Allowed IPv4 source networks. These must not be multicast networks.
